channel.title: Comments on: Lost Abbey Avant Garde, Ep. 51
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: The Lost Abbey » Lost Abbey News Round-up
item.dc:creator: The Lost Abbey » Lost Abbey News Round-up

item.title: By: Steve M
item.dc:creator: Steve M
item.description: David; Ahem, ahem, here, here.... hopefully you will be more, huh, in a 'sharing' mood come April 18, if not May 2 also? Hmmmm?.
item.content:encoded: David; Ahem, ahem, here, here…. hopefully you will be more, huh, in a ‘sharing’ mood come April 18, if not May 2 also? Hmmmm?.

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: I love the biere de garde style! I brought some of Avant Garde back from my last trip to California along with others from Lost Abbey and Russian River. I wasn't nice enough to share though ... maybe I'll dip back into my cellar and see what's left.
item.content:encoded: I love the biere de garde style! I brought some of Avant Garde back from my last trip to California along with others from Lost Abbey and Russian River. I wasn’t nice enough to share though … maybe I’ll dip back into my cellar and see what’s left.
